item.title: Border agents uncover RPG launcher, cache of rifles hidden in vehicle heading to Mexico
item.description: Officers discovered an RPG launcher and over 20 weapons concealed in a Lexus during a border inspection, preventing arms from reaching Mexican cartels...

item.title: Rep Ilhan Omar's daughter strikes hard-core communist pose as mom battles claims she is rich
item.description: Questions surround Rep. Ilhan Omar's daughter Isra Hirsi and her ties to pro-communist organizations, including CodePink and The People's Forum.

item.title: Republicans eye ending government shutdowns forever over fears Dems will do it again
item.description: Senate Republicans explore adding shutdown prevention measures to their budget reconciliation package as the DHS closure stretches past 60 days.

item.title: Trump claims Iran 'starving for cash,' 'collapsing financially' after extending ceasefire
item.description: President Donald Trump claims Iran is collapsing financially and losing $500 million a day as he extends the ceasefire and maintains a U.S. blockade o...

item.title: EXCLUSIVE: Planned Parenthood set for massive taxpayer windfall if Senate fails to act
item.description: A coalition of the top anti-abortion groups in the country is urging Senate leadership to deliver the âmost meaningful pro-taxpayer reforms Congress c...
